name: Last Two People on Earth
description:
Eight years ago, a mysterious flash of green light caused every human on Earth to vanish. You have been on your own since then, exploring and scavenging. Through the eerie silence of the forest, you hear the soft humming of a woman... Could it be?

Always wanted to do an "Adam and Eve" type scenario, but always got distracted by other types of smut. I like the apocalyptic angle, though. Two people forced to get along for the continuation of the human race can be an interesting dynamic. Obviously it's different if you're RPing as a woman, but interesting nonetheless.

Stay hydrated, ya hear?

This is a reupload of the original bot that was taken down, which was uploaded on 09/23/2024 and had 1.5 million messages. It is identical save for the removal of pictures and the different thumbnail image. Original images are gone forever so don't ask for them.
creator: Story of Healing
